title: DG Chat Hover
description: DG-Chat Hovers is a lightweight, modern chat plugin for Minecraft servers that brings your chat to life with stylish hover menus, private messaging, and dynamic player stats.
body:
##   🗨️ DG-Chat Hovers      
 DG-Chat Hovers is a modern and lightweight Minecraft chat plugin designed to make your server’s chat more interactive, stylish, and player-focused. It adds hoverable player info, clickable chat, private messaging, kill messages, and full placeholder support — all while staying fast and reload-safe.

## ✨ Features                
>  ****Hoverable Chat Names
Players’ names in chat show a detailed hover menu with:****
```

```


    
****🏷 Rank → from LuckPerms  
💰 Balance → from Vault Economy    
⏳ Playtime → formatted in hours      
👥 Team → from BetterTeams  
🗡 Kills & Deaths→ statistics     
❤ Hearts → heart's amount****
(supports LifestealCore & Lifestealz)  

```

```

📩 “Click to Message” → instantly opens /msg <player>             
🔹 Chat Format
Customizable chat format with all LuckPerms prefixes & suffixes
Stylish ❱❱ arrow layout
Fully editable via config.yml  

🔹 Private Messaging System
Built-in /msg <player> <message> and /reply <message>
No permissions needed → all players can use by default
Messages have hover and click features for easy replies     

🔹 Kill Messages
Toggleable custom kill/death messages in config.yml
Example:

```

```

****victim_name was defeated by killer_name****         
Replaces vanilla death messages if enabled        

```


```

### 📦 Dependencies
****This plugins Is Required****  

1. ****[LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/luckperms)**** → Rank & prefix                   
2. ****[PlaceholderAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi)**** → Required for all placeholders

### 📦  Soft Dependencies
****This Plugins Is Optional**** 

1. ****Vault**** → Economy integration
2. ****BetterTeams**** → Team
3. ****Lifesteal**** → For hearts (supports LifestealCore & Lifestealz)
